product: Share Genie Spaces externally using OpenSharing (Beta)
tagline: Providers can now share a Genie Space with users outside their organization using OpenSharing.
what_it_does: Providers can now share a Genie Space with users outside their organization using OpenSharing. Databricks creates a point in time snapshot of the space's data assets and instructions. Recipients can mount the share to create a local Genie Space.
why_it_matters: To reduce the size, shorten instructions or descriptions, then try again.
plain_summary: Providers can now share a Genie Space with users outside their organization using OpenSharing. Databricks creates a point in time snapshot of the space's data assets and instructions.
key_takeaway: Providers can now share a Genie Space with users outside their organization using OpenSharing.
